transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling Pain Management and Neurology Clinic, this is Maria. How can I help you today?
Caller: Hi Maria, I'd like to schedule a follow-up appointment with Dr. Patel.
Agent: Of course! May I have your full name and date of birth so I can pull up your chart?
Caller: Sure, it's John Thompson, date of birth March 12, 1978.
Agent: Thank you, Mr. Thompson. I have your chart here. Dr. Patel is available next Tuesday, January 21st at 10:00 AM or Thursday, January 23rd at 2:30 PM. Which works better for you?
Caller: Tuesday at 10 works great.
Agent: Perfect. I've scheduled you for Tuesday, January 21st at 10:00 AM with Dr. Patel at our Riverside location. Please arrive 15 minutes early and bring your insurance card and photo ID.
Caller: Great, thank you.
Agent: You're welcome, Mr. Thompson. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Caller: No, that's all. Thanks again.
Agent: Have a wonderful day! Goodbye.
